steps: "File IB 92 Universeel form with Dutch Belastingdienst claiming NL-NO treaty rate of 15% on Unilever NV dividend",
"Submit documentation proving Norwegian tax residency and beneficial ownership of 520,000 UNA shares",
"Request refund of EUR 22,193.60 excess withholding (25% standard rate vs. 15% treaty rate)",
"Follow up with ABN AMRO Custody to ensure proper treaty rate application for future Unilever dividends"

references.title: Belastingdienst – Recipient of Dividend Outside Netherlands – Refund
